items.name: step-indicator
items.title: Step Indicator
items.description: A step indicator component for multi-step forms and processes
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: step-indicator-demo
items.title: Step Indicator Demo
items.description: Interactive demo of the step indicator component
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: step-indicator-vertical
items.title: Step Indicator Vertical
items.description: Vertical variant of the step indicator component
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: step-indicator-with-descriptions
items.title: Step Indicator with Descriptions
items.description: Step indicator component with detailed descriptions for each step
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: bitcoin-avatar
items.title: Bitcoin Avatar
items.description: Hybrid avatar that resolves on-chain images for Bitcoin addresses with deterministic sigma-avatars fallback
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: bitcoin-avatar-demo
items.title: Bitcoin Avatar Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing sizes, variants, and on-chain image resolution for the bitcoin avatar component
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: connect-wallet
items.title: Connect Wallet
items.description: An opinionated wallet connection button with provider selection dialog and connected-state dropdown, wrapping @1sat/react primitives in shadcn UI
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: connect-wallet-demo
items.title: Connect Wallet Demo
items.description: Demo showing all three variants (default, compact, outline) of the connect wallet component
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: inscribe-file
items.title: Inscribe File
items.description: Full inscription flow with tabbed interface for file upload, BSV20 tokens, and BSV21 tokens. Includes content type override, BAP signing, metadata editor, and on-chain inscription via @1sat/actions
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: inscribe-file-demo
items.title: Inscribe File Demo
items.description: Demo of the inscribe file block with simulated inscription
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: create-listing
items.title: Create Listing
items.description: Dialog-based ordinal listing component for selling NFTs on the global orderbook via @1sat/actions listOrdinal
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: create-listing-demo
items.title: Create Listing Demo
items.description: Demo of the create listing component with a sample ordinal
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: buy-listing
items.title: Buy Listing
items.description: Card component for purchasing ordinal NFTs from the global orderbook via @1sat/actions purchaseOrdinal
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: buy-listing-demo
items.title: Buy Listing Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing a grid of ordinal listings with the buy listing component
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: send-bsv
items.title: Send BSV
items.description: Complete send BSV block with trigger variants (default, compact, quick) and a dialog form with sats/BSV toggle, fee estimate, and confirmation flow
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: send-bsv-demo
items.title: Send BSV Demo
items.description: Demo showing all three trigger variants (default, compact, quick) of the send BSV block
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: post-button
items.title: Post Button
items.description: Compose-dialog button for creating on-chain BSocial posts with default, compact, fab, and inline variants
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: post-button-demo
items.title: Post Button Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing all four variants (default, compact, inline, fab) of the post button component
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: like-button
items.title: Like Button
items.description: Optimistic like/unlike toggle for BSocial content with heart or thumbs-up icon, count display, and default, compact, text variants
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: like-button-demo
items.title: Like Button Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing all variants and icon options for the like button component
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: follow-button
items.title: Follow Button
items.description: Three-state follow/following/unfollow toggle for BSocial identities with hover-to-unfollow UX and default, compact, pill variants
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: follow-button-demo
items.title: Follow Button Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing all variants, states, and custom labels for the follow button component
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: friend-button
items.title: Friend Button
items.description: Four-state friend request button (Add Friend, Pending, Accept/Decline, Friends) using BSocial mutual follows and Type-42 key derivation
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: friend-button-demo
items.title: Friend Button Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing all four friendship states and compact variant for the friend button component
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: deploy-token
items.title: Deploy Token
items.description: BSV21 fungible token deployment block with symbol input, icon upload, max supply, decimals, fee estimate, and deploy action via @1sat/core deployBsv21Token
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: deploy-token-demo
items.title: Deploy Token Demo
items.description: Demo of the deploy token block with simulated deployment
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: token-list
items.title: Token List
items.description: Displays a list of BSV20/BSV21 fungible token holdings with balances, icons, and token details fetched from the 1Sat API
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: token-list-demo
items.title: Token List Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing token holdings list with populated, loading, and empty states
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: market-grid
items.title: Market Grid
items.description: Responsive grid of ordinal NFT listings from the global orderbook with ORDFS thumbnails, price badges, seller info, buy actions, pagination, and skeleton loading
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: market-grid-demo
items.title: Market Grid Demo
items.description: Demo of the market grid block with mock ordinal listings
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: ordinals-grid
items.title: Ordinals Grid
items.description: Responsive grid of owned ordinal NFTs with ORDFS thumbnails, content type badges, and name/outpoint display. Fetches from 1sat API or accepts pre-loaded data.
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: ordinals-grid-demo
items.title: Ordinals Grid Demo
items.description: Demo of the ordinals grid block with mock ordinal data and selection callback
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: social-feed
items.title: Social Feed
items.description: Chronological feed of on-chain BSocial posts with avatar, author name, timestamp, content, like/reply actions, infinite scroll pagination, and channel filtering via the 1sat-stack API
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: social-feed-demo
items.title: Social Feed Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing the social feed block with mock BSocial posts, click handlers, and channel badges
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: profile-card
items.title: Profile Card
items.description: BAP identity profile card with avatar, name, bio, identity key, and follow action slot. Fetches profile data from the 1sat-stack BAP API.
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: profile-card-demo
items.title: Profile Card Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing the profile card block with mock BAP profile data, action slot, loading, error, and empty states
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: identity-selector
items.title: Identity Selector
items.description: Dropdown panel for switching between BAP identities with avatar, name, full BAP ID, active indicator, and add identity action
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: identity-selector-demo
items.title: Identity Selector Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing the identity selector block with mock identities, interactive selection, loading, and error states
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: wallet-overview
items.title: Wallet Overview
items.description: Wallet dashboard card displaying BSV balance with privacy toggle, payment and ordinal addresses with copy buttons, identity key, and send/receive action buttons. Supports @1sat/react WalletProvider (web), direct wallet source (desktop), or fully prop-driven UI. API URL is overrideable.
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: wallet-overview-demo
items.title: Wallet Overview Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing the wallet overview block with connected, loading, error, and disconnected states
items.author: Satchmo

items.name: receive-address
items.title: Receive Address
items.description: QR code and deposit address display with clipboard copy and optional address rotation. Supports default, compact, and inline variants.
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: receive-address-demo
items.title: Receive Address Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing default, compact, and inline variants of the receive address block
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: transaction-history
items.title: Transaction History
items.description: Transaction list with status indicators, amounts, relative dates, and pagination. Supports default and compact variants with inbound/outbound display.
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: transaction-history-demo
items.title: Transaction History Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing default and compact variants, loading, and empty states of the transaction history block
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: sync-terminal
items.title: Sync Terminal
items.description: Monospace event log for blockchain sync activity with colour-coded severity levels, auto-scroll, and connection status indicator
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: sync-terminal-demo
items.title: Sync Terminal Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing the sync terminal block with streaming mock events and pause/clear controls
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: mnemonic-flow
items.title: Mnemonic Flow
items.description: Multi-mode seed phrase display and input block with create, display, import, and verify modes. Includes numbered word grid, copy-all, confirmation checkbox, and verification challenge.
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: mnemonic-flow-demo
items.title: Mnemonic Flow Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing all four modes (create, display, import, verify) of the mnemonic flow block
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: lock-bsv
items.title: Lock BSV
items.description: Time-lock BSV until a future block height with lock form, lock summary, and unlock for matured locks via @1sat/actions lockBsv and unlockBsv
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: lock-bsv-demo
items.title: Lock BSV Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing the lock BSV block with pre-populated locks, empty state, and simulated lock/unlock operations
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: sweep-wallet
items.title: Sweep Wallet
items.description: Sweep assets from a WIF private key into the connected wallet. Scans for funding UTXOs, ordinals, and BSV-21 tokens, previews found assets, and sweeps with progress.
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: sweep-wallet-demo
items.title: Sweep Wallet Demo
items.description: Demo of the sweep wallet block with simulated scan and sweep operations
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: opns-manager
items.title: OpNS Manager
items.description: OpNS name management block for listing owned names and registering or deregistering identity key bindings via @1sat/actions opns module
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: opns-manager-demo
items.title: OpNS Manager Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing the OpNS manager block with mock names, register/deregister actions, loading and empty states
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: send-bsv21
items.title: Send BSV21
items.description: Token send form with selector dropdown, decimal-aware amount input, recipient address, and confirmation flow for transferring BSV21 fungible tokens via @1sat/actions sendBsv21
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: send-bsv21-demo
items.title: Send BSV21 Demo
items.description: Demo of the send BSV21 token form with mock token balances and simulated transfer
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: unlock-wallet
items.title: Unlock Wallet
items.description: Passphrase and biometric unlock screen with Touch ID support on macOS, passphrase fallback, failed attempt tracking, and success state
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: unlock-wallet-demo
items.title: Unlock Wallet Demo
items.description: Demo showing macOS Touch ID and passphrase unlock variants with simulated authentication
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: bigblocks-provider
items.title: BigBlocks Provider
items.description: Context provider that configures how all BigBlocks hooks fetch data. Web mode fetches from 1sat-stack API; custom mode lets you supply your own fetchers for desktop RPC, testing, or SSR.
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: bigblocks-provider-demo
items.title: BigBlocks Provider Demo
items.description: Demo showing web mode and custom mode configurations for BigBlocksProvider
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: theme-token-provider
items.title: Theme Token Provider
items.description: On-chain theme picker using @theme-token/sdk. Provider context and settings panel for selecting, applying, and persisting blockchain-inscribed ThemeTokens.
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>

items.name: theme-token-provider-demo
items.title: Theme Token Provider Demo
items.description: Demo showcasing the ThemeTokenProvider and ThemeTokenSettings panel with on-chain theme application
items.author: Satchmo <https://bigblocks.dev>
